creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161966
Patch to update multimedia/emby-server to 3.0.5724.6

The attached patch updates multimedia/emby-server to the latest upstream stable release 3.0.5724.6.

Changes this release:
 * Fix windows restart hang
 * Fix presence of ffprobe data stream causing subtitles to be ordered incorrectly, leading to occasional transcoding failures.
